case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. SAMUEL, MARIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMUEL, MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 47 WILLS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $807.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $807.00, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL BE ISSUED FORTHWITH.
